title: Adani Power - Force Motors among 5 F&O stocks with sharp rise in futures OI - The Economic Times
content:
As of April 6, five stocks in the NSE F&O segment saw a sharp surge in futures open interest, each recording over 30% growth compared with the previous session.
A rise in futures open interest indicates an increase in the number of active, unexpired contracts in a stock, signalling fresh position build-up or addition to existing positions by market participants.
summary:
